name: bytestreams
description: ByteStreams marketing site — Smarter Workflows, Stronger Results

scripts.build:public: rm -rf public && mkdir -p public && cp *.html public/ && cp -r assets dist js public/ && find public/dist -name '*.map' -delete || true
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build:public && wrangler dev --config wrangler.toml --port 8787

author: ByteStreams
